arts.ttl: Napoli close in on agreement with Dortmund for Kvaratskhelia replacement
arts.sum: Napoli are reportedly close to an agreement with Borussia Dortmund over a fee for Karim...

arts.ttl: Arsenal defender Borussia Dortmund's top target ahead of Ben Chilwell
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has fallen down the pecking order at Arsenal and may now be rescued by Bundesliga giants Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund considering £50m Chelsea player despite opening talks with Arsenal for Oleksandr Zinchenko
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Borussia Dortmund have held fresh talks with Arsenal over loan deal for Oleksandr Zinchenko, however they have also contacted Chelsea about...

arts.ttl: Tullberg gives squad update at first press conference as Dortmund's interim coach
arts.sum: At his first press conference as Borussia Dortmund's interim coach, Mike Tullberg gave an update on his squad.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi has doubts over Napoli move
arts.sum: Napoli face a roadblock in the race to sign Borussia Dortmund’s Karim Adeyemi. According to a report by Ciro Venerato via Calcio Napoli 24, Napoli face worrying times as Dortmund…

arts.ttl: Werder duo ruled out of Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Niklas Stark and Julian Malatini will both miss Werder's trip to Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal's Zinchenko headed to Dortmund
arts.sum: Arsenal left-back Oleksandr Zinchenko could be set to leave the Emirates Stadium amid interest from Borussia Dortmund, while PSV Eindhoven have no plans to part ways with U.S. men's national team striker Ricardo Pepi . - Oleksandr Zinchenko is expected to leave Arsenal before the end of the transfer window, reports the Daily Telegraph .

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund interim head coach Mike Tullberg: “One thing is clear: the players have not forgotten how to play football.”
arts.sum: Speaking at Borussia Dortmund’s first press conference after sacking head coach Nuri Şahin, interim Mike Tullberg has spoke about the first team. Tullberg, who is Dortmund’s under-19 head coach has…

arts.ttl: Fischer also touted as candidate for Dortmund job
arts.sum: Former Union Berlin coach Urs Fischer has been named as a candidate to replace Nuri Sahin at Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Werder Bremen preview: Two struggling sides look to turn things around
arts.sum: Both Borussia Dortmund and Werder Bremen are in real need of a win in order to get back on the right track.
